entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogea L., the crop studied for its susceptibility to aflatoxin contamination under drought stress

entities.name: AFLATOXIN
entities.description: Naturally occurring toxic chemical substances produced by Aspergillus flavus that contaminate groundnuts

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: Fungal species that produces aflatoxins and whose population in the soil is affected by drought stress

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition imposed at different levels to study its effect on aflatoxin contamination and fungal populations

entities.name: ICRISAT-CHITEDZE AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH STATION
entities.description: The research facility in Malawi where the screen house study was conducted

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the ICRISAT-Chitedze Agricultural Research Station is located

entities.name: NEOGENSTRIPS
entities.description: Diagnostic tool used in conjunction with a mobile assay tablet reader to estimate aflatoxin levels in groundnut grains

entities.name: SERIAL DILUTIONS ON MDRB
entities.description: Laboratory method using modified dichloran Rose Bengal selective media to quantify Aspergillus flavus population in soil

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence and concentration of aflatoxins in groundnut grains, measured in ppb

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS POPULATION
entities.description: The density of Aspergillus flavus fungi in soil samples, measured in cfu/g
